sqlMap.insert: insert into UnderwritingQues(EffectiveDate, StateCode LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#EffectiveDate#, #StateCode# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select EffectiveDate, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, StateCode from UnderwritingQues where EffectiveDate = #EffectiveDate# and StateCode = #StateCode#
sqlMap.update:
update UnderwritingQues set
LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where EffectiveDate = #EffectiveDate# and StateCode = #StateCode#
sqlMap.delete: delete from UnderwritingQues where EffectiveDate = #EffectiveDate# and StateCode = #StateCode#
sqlMap.select: select EffectiveDate, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, StateCode from UnderwritingQues where EffectiveDate = #EffectiveDate# and StateCode = #StateCode#
select EffectiveDate, StateCode, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from UnderwritingQues where StateCode = #StateCode#
